channel.title: Higher Ed Intelligence Brief
channel.description: Weekly briefing with links and LinkedIn-ready drafts.

item.title: MA Budget: Community College SUCCESS Fund (7100-4002)
item.description: Anchor page for tracking SUCCESS language/amounts and wraparound support intent through the FY27 budget process.

item.title: Will funding follow the kudos?
item.description: During a House Appropriations subcommittee hearing on Wednesday, Democrats and Republicans lauded community colleges for their critical role in preparing students for in-demand jobs. However, the question is whether appropriators will back that enthusiasm with... The post Will funding follow the kudos? first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: MassDHE News Clips: Community Colleges
item.description: MassDHE’s community college news-clips page often surfaces Massachusetts system-level developments, transfer, workforce, affordability, and funding coverage.

item.title: Washington Watch: House Farm Bill includes new community college grant program
item.description: A committee-passed House bill to reauthorize the Farm Bill includes a new competitive grant program for community colleges to provide agricultural workforce training. The House Agriculture Committee on Thursday advanced the Food, Farm and National... The post Washington Watch: House Farm Bill includes new community college grant program first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: A statewide approach to CPL
item.description: Editor’s note: This is the second of two articles exploring how some community colleges are expanding the use of credit for prior learning. The first piece is here. In California, the statewide approach to awarding... The post A statewide approach to CPL first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: Headlines
item.description: Community colleges tout success of state-sponsored business partnerships Iowa Capital Dispatch Representatives from Iowa’s community colleges and their business partners gathered in the Iowa Capitol this week to showcase their unique programs and partnerships to... The post Headlines first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: Newsmakers
item.description: New CEO Jeremy L. Pickard will become president of Southwest Wisconsin Technical College on July 1. He is currently vice chancellor of academic affairs at Eastern Iowa Community Colleges. Over his career, Pickard has built... The post Newsmakers first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: GovInfo RSS Feeds Directory
item.description: Official federal RSS directory for Federal Register, bills, GAO reports, and other primary-source policy signals.

item.title: H.J. Res. 151 (IH) - Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Bureau of Land Management relating to Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monument Record of Decision and Approved Resource Management Plan.

item.title: WIOA revamp needed to boost employer-led training
item.description: As the demand for workers with technical skills and knowledge of artificial intelligence (AI) increases, so is the call for the reauthorization and modernization of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA). At a March... The post WIOA revamp needed to boost employer-led training first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: WIOA revamp needed to boost employer-led training
item.description: As the demand for workers with technical skills and knowledge of artificial intelligence (AI) increases, so is the call for the reauthorization and modernization of the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA). At a March... The post WIOA revamp needed to boost employer-led training first appeared on Community College Daily .

item.title: Journal Submissions Riddled With AI-Created Fake Citations
item.description: Journal Submissions Riddled With AI-Created Fake Citations Emma Whitford Fri, 03/06/2026 - 03:00 AM References used to be one of the last things journal editors checked before publishing a paper. Artificial intelligence is changing that. Byline(s) Emma Whitford

item.title: Florida bill seeks further limit on out-of-state enrollment at top universities
item.description: The state’s House passed a measure that would cap nonresident students to no more than 5% of first-time, full-time fall enrollment at certain institutions.

item.title: What Students Gain When Teachers — Not AI — Grade Students’ Work
item.description: How a lawyer-turned-teacher-turned-AI ethicist used assessment to personalize instruction before AI-powered edtech existed.

item.title: Report Urges California to Improve College Access
item.description: Report Urges California to Improve College Access Joshua.Bay Fri, 03/06/2026 - 03:00 AM A new report outlines reforms—from transfer improvements to credit recognition—to help the state reach its 70 percent college attainment goal. Byline(s) Joshua Bay
